prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类相关专业中，电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息/通信等为高热推荐专业，社会热度持续升温；生化环材、土木建筑等专业明显劝退。河北省2026年普通高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（606754人）小幅增加约3000人，竞争略有加剧；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，在河北省属跨省招生。2025年该校在河北省招生18人（含物理类+历史类），占该校全国总招生约3%，占比不高；宁夏地处西北，与河北地理距离较远，地域偏好对河北考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次55712名、2026年物理类扩招21%（计划从100人增至121人）这一核心因素；同时考虑河北省考生总数小幅增加、省控线上升趋势、电气/计算机等工科专业社会热度持续升温等因素，竞争略有加剧。，结合考生规模扩大及工科热度上升做小幅修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约62932名，区间62432–63432名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 38272 → 42788 → 65566 → 52953 → 55712, showing significant volatility: in 2023, it dropped sharply to 65566 due to a gap, rebounded strongly to 52953 in 2024, and slightly moved back to 55712 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 3 years exceeds 12,000 places, with the 2025 baseline around 55712; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province: 56 in 2021, 74 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 68 in 2024, 100 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 121, an increase of 21% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, which is expected to lower the admission threshold, increasing the minimum ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking: 170th in 2021 → 167th in 2022 → 149th in 2023 → 128th in 2024 → 134th in 2025 → 137th in 2026, with rankings steadily rising in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 university reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average (104th overall), with low short video exposure; no gap signals related to Ningxia University have been found in historical admission anomaly records, and the application psychology is relatively stable; Ningxia University did not enter the A- or above grade list in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with advantageous disciplines mainly in characteristic fields such as Grass Science and Ethnology, which have average relevance to Physics Category enrollment majors (Electrical, Computer, Chemical Engineering, Agriculture and Forestry), and limited impact on application heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category related majors, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended majors with continuously rising social heat; majors like Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, Civil Engineering, and Architecture are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, a slight increase of about 3,000 compared to 2025 (606,754), with slightly intensified competition; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan City, Ningxia, and recruits across provinces in Hebei Province. In 2025, the university enrolled 18 students in Hebei Province (including Physics Category + History Category), accounting for about 3% of the university's total national enrollment, a low proportion; Ningxia is located in the northwest, far from Hebei geographically, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Hebei candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the core factor of the 2025 baseline ranking of 55712 and the 21% expansion of Physics Category in 2026 (plan from 100 to 121); while considering factors such as a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, an upward trend in the provincial control line, and continuously rising social heat for engineering majors like Electrical and Computer, competition has slightly intensified. With minor adjustments considering the expansion of the candidate pool and the rise in engineering heat, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 62932, with a range of 62432–63432.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 62932, range 62432–63432. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Statistics, New Energy, Mechanical, etc.), Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Software) require a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Agriculture and Forestry, Civil Engineering) can serve as safety options. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<62432) can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (>63432) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety. Ningxia University is a 211 platform, with relatively low admission thresholds for Agriculture and Forestry and Chemical Engineering majors, suitable for candidates prioritizing university level.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 8459 → 7438 → 6113 → 7708 → 11023, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then a significant backward shift: from 2021 to 2023, it moved forward year by year (from 8459 to 6113), in 2024 it slightly moved back to 7708, and in 2025 it sharply moved back to 11023, with a single-year backward shift of about 3315 places, indicating significant fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 11023; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province: 13 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 35, an increase of about 16.7% compared to 2025, with consecutive years of expansion, which is expected to lower the admission threshold and increase the minimum ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising in recent years (137th in 2026), overall at the upper-middle level nationally, with some appeal to liberal arts candidates; the university's reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average (104th overall); no signs of admission gaps related to Ningxia University in historical abnormal admission records, indicating relatively stable application psychology; Ningxia University did not enter the A- or above grade list in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with advantageous disciplines mainly in characteristic fields such as Grassland Science and Ethnology, which have limited relevance to History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, Finance, English, Arabic, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category-related majors, Chinese Language/Literature and Law are recommended majors with high social popularity; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged; Finance/Finance/Economics are divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, with History Category estimated at about 245,140 based on the recent proportion of about 40%, a slight increase of about 1,426 compared to 2025 (243,714); Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Hebei Province, with a total enrollment of 18 students in Hebei Province in 2025, accounting for about 3%. Ningxia is located in the northwest, far from Hebei geographically, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Hebei liberal arts candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 11023, the core factor of a 16.7% expansion in History Category in 2026 (plan increased from 30 to 35); also considering the continuation effect of the significant backward shift in 2025 (+3315), the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, and the upward trend of the provincial control line, with minor adjustments based on the expansion of candidate numbers and the differentiation of liberal arts major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 12225, with a range of 11725–12725.
